smg.text: Overcast. Occasional showers, heavy at times. A few thunderstorms. Force 3 to 4 north to northeasterly winds with gusts.
Mainly cloudy. A few showers at first. Force 3 to 4 east to northeasterly winds with gusts.
Cloudy apart from sunny periods. Force 3 to 4 easterly winds.
Mainly cloudy. A few showers. A few thunderstorms later. Force 3 to 4 east to southeasterly winds with gusts.
Mainly cloudy. Occasional showers. A few thunderstorms. Force 3 to 4 southerly winds with gusts.
Cloudy. Showers. A few thunderstorms. Force 3 to 5 south to southwesterly winds with gusts.
Mainly cloudy. A few showers. A few thunderstorms at first. Force 2 to 4 southwesterly winds with gusts, becoming east to northeasterlies.
